title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: Red Bull drivers give verdict on British GP hopes
items.content: Max Verstappen and Isack Hadjar have given their verdicts on how they think Red Bull will perform this weekend in the British Grand Prix after a recent upturn in form.
items.contentSnippet: Max Verstappen and Isack Hadjar have given their verdicts on how they think Red Bull will perform this weekend in the British Grand Prix after a recent upturn in form.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 红牛车手马克斯·维斯塔潘和伊斯卡·哈德贾对近期状态回升的红牛在英国大奖赛中的表现进行了评估。
summaries.en: Max Verstappen and Isack Hadjar assessed Red Bull's potential performance at the British Grand Prix following a recent form improvement. Both drivers shared their thoughts on the team's chances this weekend.

items.summary: 红牛车手马克斯·维斯塔潘和伊斯卡·哈德贾对近期状态回升的红牛在英国大奖赛中的表现进行了评估。

items.title: All the stories that got the Silverstone paddock talking
items.content: Mercedes driver George Russell could not arrive in better form to his home race at Silverstone, the Briton securing his first win since the season opener in Australia last time out in Austria. It wasn’t just the result that was important, but more the wonders his performance has done for his confidence, having endured a string of defeats to sophomore team mate Kimi Antonelli.
items.contentSnippet: Mercedes driver George Russell could not arrive in better form to his home race at Silverstone, the Briton securing his first win since the season opener in Australia last time out in Austria. It wasn’t just the result that was important, but more the wonders his performance has done for his confidence, having endured a string of defeats to sophomore team mate Kimi Antonelli.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 梅赛德斯车手乔治·鲁塞尔在主场银石站表现出色，自去年澳大利亚站以来首次夺冠，并显著提升了他的信心。此前，他一直被队友 Kimi Antonelli 压制。此次胜利为他带来了突破，成为银石站的热门话题。
summaries.en: George Russell secured his first win since Australia at his home race in Silverstone, boosting his confidence after a series of defeats to teammate Kimi Räikkönen. The Mercedes driver's performance generated significant buzz in the paddock.

items.summary: 梅赛德斯车手乔治·鲁塞尔在主场银石站表现出色，自去年澳大利亚站以来首次夺冠，并显著提升了他的信心。此前，他一直被队友 Kimi Antonelli 压制。此次胜利为他带来了突破，成为银石站的热门话题。

items.title: Russell reveals Mercedes challenge before home Grand Prix
items.content: Mercedes' George Russell has reflected on his confidence levels ahead of the British Grand Prix as the title fight continues to heat up.
items.contentSnippet: Mercedes' George Russell has reflected on his confidence levels ahead of the British Grand Prix as the title fight continues to heat up.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 梅赛德斯车手乔治·拉塞尔在主场大奖赛前回顾了信心水平。随着冠军争夺白热化，他表达了对比赛的期待。
summaries.en: George Russell of Mercedes discusses his team's challenge ahead of the British Grand Prix, noting the intensifying title race.

items.summary: 梅赛德斯车手乔治·拉塞尔在主场大奖赛前回顾了信心水平。随着冠军争夺白热化，他表达了对比赛的期待。

items.title: Antonelli taking 'biggest lessons' from last two weekends
items.content: Kimi Antonelli faced some setbacks in Barcelona and Austria, but the Mercedes driver is confident that he can take the learnings forward ahead of the British Grand Prix weekend.
items.contentSnippet: Kimi Antonelli faced some setbacks in Barcelona and Austria, but the Mercedes driver is confident that he can take the learnings forward ahead of the British Grand Prix weekend.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 梅赛德斯车手基米·阿隆尼利在巴塞罗那和奥地利站遭遇挫折，但他对从这两站比赛中吸取经验教训充满信心，期待在即将到来的英国大奖赛周末取得进步。
summaries.en: Kimi Antonelli, the Mercedes driver, faced setbacks in the Barcelona and Austria Grands Prix. Despite these challenges, he remains confident in extracting valuable lessons from the experiences. Antonelli aims to apply these learnings as he prepares for the British Grand Prix weekend.

items.summary: 梅赛德斯车手基米·阿隆尼利在巴塞罗那和奥地利站遭遇挫折，但他对从这两站比赛中吸取经验教训充满信心，期待在即将到来的英国大奖赛周末取得进步。

items.title: Leclerc shares doubts over Ferrari’s British GP prospects
items.content: Following another tough weekend in Austria, Charles Leclerc has outlined his expectations for Ferrari’s performance at the British Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: Following another tough weekend in Austria, Charles Leclerc has outlined his expectations for Ferrari’s performance at the British Grand Prix.

summaries.zh: 勒克莱尔对法拉利在英国大奖赛的前景表示担忧。在奥地利大奖赛后，他概述了法拉利在英国大奖赛的表现预期。
summaries.en: Charles Leclerc expresses doubts about Ferrari's prospects at the British Grand Prix after a challenging weekend in Austria.

items.title: Hamilton on Silverstone hopes after Austria ‘reality check’
items.content: Lewis Hamilton has been looking ahead to what might be possible at his home event, the British Grand Prix at Silverstone – a track at which he has experienced record-breaking success.
items.contentSnippet: Lewis Hamilton has been looking ahead to what might be possible at his home event, the British Grand Prix at Silverstone – a track at which he has experienced record-breaking success.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 刘易斯·汉密尔顿在奥地利站比赛后表示，他将把注意力转向即将到来的英国大奖赛——银石赛道，这是他取得历史性胜利的地方。
summaries.en: Lewis Hamilton is focusing on the British Grand Prix at Silverstone, a track where he has achieved significant success. Following the Austria Grand Prix, which served as a "reality check," he is looking forward to his home event.

items.summary: 刘易斯·汉密尔顿在奥地利站比赛后表示，他将把注意力转向即将到来的英国大奖赛——银石赛道，这是他取得历史性胜利的地方。

items.title: 9 memorable moments from past British Grands Prix

summaries.zh: 银石赛道举办过的英国大奖赛中有许多难忘的赛道外瞬间，以下是一些最具传播度的经典时刻。
summaries.en: The article highlights nine memorable off-track moments from past British Grands Prix at Silverstone. It focuses on the most viral incidents, emphasizing the memorable aspects of the races beyond the racing itself. The content is brief, focusing solely on these notable events without providing specific details about them.

summaries.en: Arvid Lindblad is participating in his first home race as an F1 driver at the British Grand Prix this weekend. He expressed excitement for the event.

items.title: Why Bearman is ‘not surprised’ Haas have been overtaken by rivals
items.content: Haas have faced some tricky weekends of late, with Ollie Bearman admitting that there is a reason why the squad have fallen behind their competitors.
items.contentSnippet: Haas have faced some tricky weekends of late, with Ollie Bearman admitting that there is a reason why the squad have fallen behind their competitors.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 哈斯车队近期表现不佳，领队奥利·贝尔曼承认，车队落后竞争对手并非偶然。他认为这背后有原因，但未详细说明具体因素。
summaries.en: Ollie Bearman acknowledges Haas's recent struggles, stating they face challenging weekends, which explains their drop behind rivals. He expresses being unsurprised by their performance.

items.title: Norris responds to reports linking Verstappen with McLaren
items.content: Lando Norris has shared his thoughts after reports emerged that Max Verstappen’s management have held discussions with McLaren.
items.contentSnippet: Lando Norris has shared his thoughts after reports emerged that Max Verstappen’s management have held discussions with McLaren.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 洛根·诺里斯就有关马克斯·维斯塔潘与梅赛德斯接触的传闻发表回应。报道称维斯塔潘的管理团队与梅赛德斯进行了讨论。
summaries.en: Lando Norris addressed reports that Max Verstappen's management had contacted McLaren. He confirmed the discussions but clarified he had no further details to share. The news comes amid ongoing speculation about potential team changes in Formula 1.

items.summary: 洛根·诺里斯就有关马克斯·维斯塔潘与梅赛德斯接触的传闻发表回应。报道称维斯塔潘的管理团队与梅赛德斯进行了讨论。
